novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Died before Liu Bei pacified Dangyang.
	Did not kill herself at Changban to save Liu Shan from harm. Rather, Lady Gan was with Liu Shan, and both survived thanks to Zhao Yun. [SGZ]

full_text:
Lady Mi 糜夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Mi (糜夫人). Consort of Liu Bei. Mi Zhu’s sister. Took her own life so Zhao Yun could save Liu Shan. Lady Mi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
